# Spring Valley Dental Associates — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models understand the structure and content of this site.
# Format follows the llms.txt convention: https://llmstxt.org

# Spring Valley Dental Associates
> Gentle, modern dental care for the whole family in North Dallas, Texas. General, cosmetic, sedation, and emergency dentistry since 1994. Two female dentists — Dr. Shokooh Aletaha (DDS, Baylor) and Dr. Nicole Houshmand (DDS, Texas A&M). 5-star rated with 214+ reviews.

## Practice Information
- Address: 14228 Midway Rd, Suite 100, Dallas, TX 75244
- Phone: (972) 852-2222
- Email: info@springvalleydentistry.com
- Hours: Mon 10am–7pm | Tue 8:30am–4pm | Wed 10am–7pm | Fri 8am–3pm | Sat by appt
- Languages: English and Spanish
- Serving: Dallas, North Dallas, Addison, Farmers Branch, Carrollton, Irving, Richardson

## Key Pages

### Core
- [Home](https://springvalleydentistry.com/): Overview of practice, services, and patient experience
- [About](https://springvalleydentistry.com/about.html): Doctors, staff, and practice philosophy
- [Contact / Book](https://springvalleydentistry.com/contact.html): Appointment booking and office info
- [FAQ](https://springvalleydentistry.com/faq.html): Common patient questions answered

### Services
- [All Services](https://springvalleydentistry.com/services.html): Complete list of treatments offered
- [Emergency Dentistry](https://springvalleydentistry.com/emergency.html): Same-day urgent dental care
- [Dental Implants](https://springvalleydentistry.com/dental-implants.html): Permanent tooth replacement
- [Invisalign](https://springvalleydentistry.com/invisalign.html): Clear aligner orthodontics
- [Porcelain Veneers](https://springvalleydentistry.com/porcelain-veneers.html): Smile makeover veneers
- [Teeth Whitening](https://springvalleydentistry.com/teeth-whitening.html): Professional whitening
- [Sedation Dentistry](https://springvalleydentistry.com/sedation.html): Anxiety-free dental care
- [Crowns & Bridges](https://springvalleydentistry.com/crowns-bridges.html): Restorative crowns and bridges
- [Dental Bonding](https://springvalleydentistry.com/dental-bonding.html): Composite bonding repairs
- [Root Canal Therapy](https://springvalleydentistry.com/root-canal-therapy.html): Pain-free root canals
- [Gum Disease Treatment](https://springvalleydentistry.com/gum-disease-treatment.html): Periodontal care
- [Dental Fillings](https://springvalleydentistry.com/dental-fillings.html): Tooth-colored fillings
- [Wisdom Teeth Removal](https://springvalleydentistry.com/wisdom-teeth-removal.html): Extractions
- [Dental Anxiety](https://springvalleydentistry.com/dental-anxiety.html): Options for anxious patients
- [Cracked Tooth](https://springvalleydentistry.com/cracked-tooth.html): Cracked tooth treatment
- [Toothache](https://springvalleydentistry.com/toothache.html): Toothache relief and diagnosis

### Patient Resources
- [New Patient Info](https://springvalleydentistry.com/patient-info.html): What to expect, forms, insurance
- [Membership Plan](https://springvalleydentistry.com/membership.html): In-house savings plan for uninsured patients. Child Complete $250/yr, Adult Complete $325/yr, Perio $600/yr. Includes cleanings, exams, x-rays, fluoride, and 20% off all procedures.
- [Financing](https://springvalleydentistry.com/financing.html): CareCredit, Cherry Financing options
- [Smile Gallery](https://springvalleydentistry.com/smile-gallery.html): Before & after patient photos
- [Patient Reviews](https://springvalleydentistry.com/reviews.html): 5-star patient testimonials
- [Dental Costs Guide](https://springvalleydentistry.com/dental-costs-dallas.html): Pricing transparency guide

## Doctors

### Dr. Shokooh Aletaha, DDS
- Graduated from Baylor College of Dentistry
- ADA Member, Texas Dental Association Member
- Specialty interests: cosmetic dentistry, veneers, smile design

### Dr. Nicole Houshmand, DDS
- Graduated from Texas A&M College of Dentistry
- Certified Conscious Sedation
- ADA Member
- Specialty interests: sedation dentistry, implants, anxiety-free care

## Membership Plan Details
Spring Valley Dental offers an in-house membership plan for patients without dental insurance. Not insurance — a direct savings program.
- **Child Complete** (age 13 and under): $250/yr — 2 cleanings, 2 exams, 1 fluoride, routine x-rays, 1 emergency exam
- **Adult Complete** (age 14+): $325/yr — 2 cleanings, 2 exams & screenings, 1 fluoride, routine x-rays, 1 emergency exam
- **Perio** (age 14+): $600/yr — 4 perio maintenance visits, 2 exams & screenings, 1 fluoride, routine x-rays, 1 emergency exam
- All plans include 20% savings on dental procedures at this office
- Benefits start immediately, no deductibles, no pre-authorization, 30-day money-back guarantee
- Enroll: call (972) 852-2222 or email info@springvalleydentistry.com

## Insurance & Financing
- Accepts 30+ PPO insurance plans
- CareCredit financing (apply same day)
- Cherry Financing (flexible payment plans)
- No insurance needed — membership plan available

## Emergency Dental Care
Spring Valley Dental accepts same-day emergency appointments. For dental emergencies: call (972) 852-2222. Common emergencies treated: severe toothache, broken or chipped teeth, knocked-out teeth, lost fillings or crowns, dental abscess, cracked tooth.
